hero.headline: We Electrify the Future of Rail
hero.subline: Planning and construction of overhead line systems – reliable, certified, forward-looking.

services_overview.title: Our Services
services_overview.subtitle: Specialised in the electrotechnical infrastructure of rail
services_overview.planning_desc: Expert planning of 15 kV standard overhead line systems in accordance with DB guidelines and current standards.
services_overview.erection_desc: Professional construction of overhead line systems – on time, compliant with standards, safety-conscious.
services_overview.cooperation_desc: Flexible engagement as an independent contractor, consortium partner, or subcontractor.

certificates.title: Prequalification
certificates.subtitle: Our PQ certificates confirm our qualification for public Deutsche Bahn tenders.
certificates.cert1_title: Planning 15 kV Standard Overhead Line Systems

cooperation.title: Cooperation Models
cooperation.subtitle: We work flexibly – adapted to the requirements of each project.
cooperation.independent_desc: We take full responsibility for complex projects in railway electrification – from planning through to acceptance.
cooperation.consortium_desc: For large-scale projects, we act as a reliable consortium partner, bringing our specialist expertise to the table.
cooperation.sub_desc: As a specialised subcontractor, we deliver precise partial services within larger supply chains.

cta_banner.quote: Reliability, expertise and quality – these are the values our clients rely on.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: PORR OLA GmbH – Your partner for overhead line systems
about.body: PORR OLA GmbH is a specialised company in the field of railway electrification. With deep expertise in the planning and construction of 15 kV overhead line systems, we are a reliable partner for Deutsche Bahn and private clients.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Specialised services in railway electrification
services.planning_body: We plan 15 kV standard overhead line systems in accordance with the current Deutsche Bahn guidelines. Our planning services cover complete design and execution planning, taking into account all relevant technical and normative requirements. The quality of our planning services is confirmed by PQ certification (Reference No. 134749).
services.erection_body: From the assembly of suspension and tensioning systems to final acceptance: we construct 15 kV overhead line systems on schedule and to the highest safety standards. Our certification (Reference No. 134748) demonstrates our proven competence to Deutsche Bahn.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach out to us – we look forward to your enquiry.

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.liability_content: The contents of this website have been prepared with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the contents.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of the statutory provisions (GDPR, TKG 2003).
datenschutz.responsible_content: PORR OLA GmbH, Valeska-Gert-Straße 1, 10243 Berlin, buero@porr-ola.com
datenschutz.data_content: When you contact us via the contact form, your data is stored for the purpose of processing the enquiry. We do not pass this data on without your consent.
datenschutz.rights_content: You have the right to information, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing and data portability. To exercise these rights, please contact buero@porr-ola.com.
datenschutz.more: Further information on data protection can be found at: porr-group.com/customer_information
